task: I want to go to a Lady Gaga concert in New York sometime in the next five months. Please find four tickets as close to the stage as possible and show me the total price.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by thoroughly checking StubHub and correctly determining that there are no actual Lady Gaga concerts in New York within the next five months. This is supported by the StubHub performer page at https://www.stubhub.com/lady-gaga-tickets/performer/374244, which explicitly states: “There aren’t any Lady Gaga events right now.” The agent also verified that the apparent New York dates were past dates and correctly excluded a tribute event (“Born This Way Ball - 15 Year Anniversary”) because it was not an actual Lady Gaga concert. Since no eligible real Lady Gaga event exists on StubHub for the requested window, reporting that no valid 4-ticket total price is available is a valid completed outcome.
final_result_response:
I checked StubHub for Lady Gaga, including the Mayhem Ball page/search.

Result: StubHub currently shows “There aren’t any Lady Gaga events right now” for Lady Gaga herself. The New York Mayhem Ball dates at Madison Square Garden were in March/April 2026, so they’ve already passed.

I also excluded the “Born This Way Ball - 15 Year Anniversary” listing because it’s a Lady Gaga tribute event, not an actual Lady Gaga concert.

So: no actual Lady Gaga concerts in New York are currently listed on StubHub within the next five months, through Oct. 13, 2026. No valid 4-ticket total price is available.
action_history: Opening StubHub: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.stubhub.com/');
Searching Lady Gaga: await page.locator('e15').fill('Lady Gaga New York');
Searching exact artist: await page.locator('e15').fill('Lady Gaga');
Viewing four-ticket tribute listings: await page.locator('e5').click();
Searching StubHub for Lady Gaga Mayhem: await page.locator('e2').fill('Lady Gaga Mayhem');
Searching StubHub for Lady Gaga Mayhem: await page.locator('e2').press('Enter');
Submitting Mayhem search results: await page.locator('e112').click();
